title: MMR ETHUSDT 4h CLOSED: NO_EDGE_DETECTED — worse than 1h, archetype fundamentally weak on ETH below-EMA200
content: Null-screen for hypothesis aff00b73 (MMR ETHUSDT 4h, extremeAtrMult x stopAtrBuffer x rsiOversoldMax) returned NO_EDGE_DETECTED. All 8 draws: PF=0.435-0.593 (mean=0.505, P95=0.574). Worse than ETH 1h results (mean=0.61-0.64). Trade frequency adequate (n=87-205). STRUCTURAL DIAGNOSIS: The MomentumMeanReversionEngine fires LONG entries when price is below EMA200 by extremeAtrMult*ATR AND RSI < threshold. This is a 'buy the dip in bear market' strategy. On ETH crypto, being below EMA200 implies a bearish trend context. The probability that price recovers to EMA50 (the TP target, above current price but below EMA200) before hitting the stop-loss is systematically below 50%. On longer timeframes (4h), this gets worse: 4h ATR is larger relative to the EMA200-to-EMA50 distance, meaning the R:R at entry is less favorable. ARCHETYPE VERDICT: MMR on ETH is EXHAUSTED. Evidence: (1) ETH 1h default: PF=0.57-0.70; (2) ETH 1h extended hold: PF=0.52-0.66; (3) ETH 4h: PF=0.44-0.59. All tests systematically below 0.65. The pattern is consistent: the mechanism (fade EMA200-extreme) does not generate edge on ETH at any tested timeframe. Also note: MMR BTC 1h was DISCARDED 2026-05-01 (PF=0.41-0.47, BULL-regime bleed). MMR archetype is exhausted on all tested surfaces.

structured_data.comparison_to_eth_1h: ETH 4h (mean=0.505) WORSE than ETH 1h (mean=0.61-0.64) — opposite of hypothesis
structured_data.structural_root_cause: MMR LONG fires in bear context (below EMA200). Probability of recovery to EMA50 before stop-loss is systematically < 50% on ETH at all tested timeframes.
